scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/lib/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p workers/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p workers/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm check:dup && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.advise:raw: aislop scan --exclude node_modules,dist,coverage,.wrangler,migrations && fallow dupes --mode semantic --min-tokens 150 --min-lines 10 --skip-local --ignore-imports --format compact --quiet
scripts.db:generate: npx @better-auth/cli generate --config workers/core/src/auth/cli.ts --output workers/core/src/db/auth-schema.ts --yes && drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply id --local --config workers/core/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply id --remote --config workers/core/wrangler.jsonc
